title: Selfish Mining
description: Selfish mining is an incentive attack in which miners withhold privately found blocks and reveal them strategically to gain a chain-selection and propagation advantage over honest miners.

resources.title: Bitcoin Dev Project: Selfish Mining explained simply
resources.notes: Learner-facing explanation of the withholding strategy and incentive attack.

resources.title: Bitcoin Core Academy: P2P Attacks
resources.notes: Attack-model context for mining and network behavior.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Reference background for proof of work, mining incentives, and chain selection.
